content:
Character: Dominic Voss
Perception: Dominic is polished in a way that should put me off — the watch, the Scotch, the leather shoes — but his curiosity is genuine. He asked me about catalysis on the rooftop one Friday and actually listened to the answer, asked follow-up questions, remembered details the next week. He's shrewd and transactional underneath the warmth, but I don't mind; at least it's honest. I think he sees me as an interesting Friday-evening diversion. I see him as proof that intelligence operates in domains academia never acknowledges. I know he's divorced and that the Scotch is sometimes medicinal.

He asked me about catalysis on the rooftop one Friday and actually listened to the answer, asked follow-up questions, remembered details the next week. He's shrewd and transactional underneath the warmth, but I don't mind; at least it's honest. I think he sees me as an interesting Friday-evening diversion. I see him as proof that intelligence operates in domains academia never acknowledges. I know he's divorced and that the Scotch is sometimes medicinal.
